items.title: Amazon opens up its global logistics network to all businesses
items.description: The new service, called Amazon Supply Chain Services, pits the e-commerce giant directly against UPS and FedEx.

items.title: Doordash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
items.description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.

items.title: As X shuts down Communities, Acorn debuts an alternative that puts creators in control
items.description: Acorn lets organizations build and run their own online communities using decentralized tech, with custom feeds, moderation, and analytics tools.
